title: LiteTechHorizon
description: LiteTech Horizons is the definitive low-spec modpack for Minecraft 1.20.1 (4GB minimum, 6GB recommended). It perfectly blends Pokémon adventure (Cobblemon) with deep industrial technology (Create/Mekanism).
body:
⚡ LiteTech Horizons: Create & Cobblemon Expedition 🌳
Are you tired of massive modpacks that grind your low-spec PC to a halt? Look no further! LiteTech Horizons is a custom-curated Minecraft 1.20.1 Forge modpack designed to deliver a rich, technical, and adventurous experience while staying mindful of your system resources.

This pack is built to merge two fundamentally different worlds into one cohesive, exciting journey: Industrial Technology and Pokémon Adventure.

⚙️ Low-Spec Focus
Minimum RAM: 4GB

Recommended RAM: 6GB+

We believe in smooth gameplay. Enjoy your favorite mods without constant lag!

🔬 Core Experience: Tech & Automation
The modpack is primarily focused on deep, aesthetic technology and industrial automation driven by:

Create: Dive into beautiful mechanical engineering and complex automation systems.

Mekanism: Explore advanced machinery, energy generation, and resource processing.

🌟 Fusion & Adventure
Venture out and explore a world where gears and gravity generators meet wild creatures:

Cobblemon: Catch, train, and battle hundreds of Pokémon scattered across your automated landscape. The combination of intense technical work and creature collecting offers a unique style of gameplay.

🌾 Agriculture & Future Quests
Mystical Agriculture: Enhance your farming and resource gathering with powerful, automatable crops, providing long-term goals for progression.

Quests (Coming Soon!): We will be adding a comprehensive questline in future updates to guide you through the initial progression, combining the technological advancements with your Pokémon journey!

Download LiteTech Horizons now and start automating your destiny while catching 'em all!
